The '''Battle of Nickel One''' was an early conflict of the [[Swarm War]].

{{Battle-stub}}

==Battle==
A team of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] were sent to [[Nickel One]] to prevent the [[Killik/Legends|Killiks]] and their [[tarhead]] and [[Joiner]] [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] allies from staging a coup. [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Mara Jade Skywalker]], and [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] entered the system to find the Killik forces already landing on the [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]]. The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] received a distress call from the Verpine Hive Mother informing them she was under attack. While Mara and Luke destroyed the rest of the Killik force's transports, Jacen entered the colony alone and on foot and cut down the [[Killik/Legends|invaders]] with his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].

==Appearances==
